---
description: "Documentation and examples conventions for kvx. Use when creating or updating docs, tutorials, or examples."
applyTo: "docs/**,examples/**,**/*.md"
---

# Documentation & Examples

- Use `docs/` for documentation pages and guides
- Use `docs/tutorials/` for step-by-step tutorials
- Use `examples/` for example programs demonstrating kvx usage (embedding, custom structs, display schemas, etc.)
- Always create documentation, tutorials, and examples for new features and commands
- Always update documentation, tutorials, and examples when features or commands change
